message:
feat(fuzz+tests): add time/math/inet fuzz targets and expand nss_cache_policy tests

New fuzz targets (bd-2hh.4):
- fuzz_time: epoch round-trips, asctime, strftime, difftime, clock validators
- fuzz_math: trig identities, exp/log inverses, float utils, f32 variants, specials
- fuzz_inet: IPv4/IPv6 parsing round-trips, byte-order inverses, parse consistency

Expand nss_cache_policy_test from 6 to 12 tests: empty file handling,
iteration exhaustion, UID/GID lookup, setpwent rewind.

Fuzz targets: 9→12, nightly runner updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+doc = false

+
